name: gradientEnd
description: End-stop color for the `gradient` variant. Defaults to the `--gradient-end` token.

name: size
description: Predefined size or any custom value (passed through as `--button-font` / pad multipliers).

name: iconOnly
description: Icon-only mode — square padding, larger glyph, no text-side gap.

name: upload
description: Animated diagonal sweep evoking an upload progress feel.

name: active
description: Force the visual "pressed" / selected state (toggle buttons).

name: animationType
description: Hover-driven content swap when an `animate` snippet is provided.

name: animateInactive
description: Disable the `animate`-snippet swap even if the snippet is present.

name: fixedWidth
description: Lock the button width to the wider of the two snippets so the swap doesn't reflow.

name: animate
description: Hover-state content (slides in from the right by default).

name: onclick
description: Click handler. Forwarded after any default navigation when `href` is set on a link button.
